rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs For Collection Of Judgment [C.C.P. 685.040, 685.080]
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 14, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL, THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, BY AND Notice Of Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs For Collection Of Judgment [C.C.P. 685.040, 685.080] GRANTED in Part and DENIED in part. Plaintiff is entitled to recover $375,990 for attorney's fees and $40,003.23 in costs. Plaintiff is not entitled to fees incurred opposing Defendant's 473 motion for relief and motion to tax costs: (1) These motions were granted in Defendant's favor and (2) efforts to oppose the motions were not taken to enforce the judgment but rather to defend it against modification. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ETHAN CHAN VS. HOWARD J. LEWIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Sever Claims Against Remax
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 14, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF ETHAN CHAN, REGINA CHAN Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Sever Claims Against Remax DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. Plaintiff may renew its motion at trial before the trial judge. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: BINGSEN LI VS. OCWEN LOAN SERVICING ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Substituting Plaintiff/Successor In Interest And Granting Leave To File A Supplemental Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 14, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF BINGSEN LI Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Substituting Plaintiff/Successor In Interest And Granting Leave To File A Supplemental Complaint DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. Declaration of Shur Wang does not comply with Code of Civ. Proc. § 377.32: The date and place of decedent's death is omitted (§ 377.32(a)(2); No Facts in support of Declarant's claim as decedent's successor in interest (§377.32(a)(5)(A); No Facts in support of Declarant's claim that she is authorized to act on behalf of decedent's successor in interest (§377.32(a)(5)(B); Copy of decedent's death certificate is not attached. (§ 377.32(c).) = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: AMISH PATEL VS. MOHAMMED RIBBI AYESH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Order: (1) Approving Final Report And Accounting And Final Compensation Of Receiver; (2) Discharge Of Receiver; (3) Termination Of Receivership; And (4) Abondoning Books And Records; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 14, 2019 line 5. OTHER MICHAEL BREWER MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Order: (1) Approving Final Report And Accounting And Final Compensation Of Receiver; (2) Discharge Of Receiver; (3) Termination Of Receivership; And (4) Abondoning Books And Records HEARING REQUIRED. Moving party to explain why he waited 5+ years to bring his motion; why he is entitled to fees if there was no completion of the sale of the license. The Court also has concerns with service of the motion. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. YADIRA PONCE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement And Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 664.6
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 14, 2019 line 7. PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION Motion For Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement And Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 664.6 DENIED. The Court finds no breach of the settlement agreement occurred on May 16 and May 22. Plaintiff's evidence regarding the May 13 incident did not establish that the locks or door were damaged on May 13 by Defendant. = (501/CFH)
